languages.text: "Это хранилище редкостей принадлежит Тразину Неисчислимому, Хранителю историй, Археовисту Галерей Солемнейса. Здесь по его воле собрано множество исторических артефактов, которые были сочтены стоящими внимания владыки. В зале, зримом тобой сейчас, покоятся примечательные артефакты из {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Простора Коронус{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Это хранилище редкостей принадлежит владыке некронов Тразину Неисчислимому, Увековечивателю историй, Хранителю Великой Библиотеки. Здесь по его воле собраны все исторические артефакты {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Простора Коронус{/g}, которые были сочтены стоящими внимания владыки".

languages.text: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Это хранилище редкостей принадлежит Тразину Неисчислимому, Хранителю историй, Археовисту Галерей Солемнейса. В зале, зримом тобой сейчас, покоятся примечательные артефакты из {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Простора Коронус{/g}".

languages.text: 「この珍品庫はネクロンのオーバーロードであるトラズン・ザ・インフィニット、歴史の継承者、大図書館の守護者のものである。コーロナス・エクスパンションの歴史的遺物で、オーバーロードの注意に値すると見なされたものは、彼の意思によってここに集められている」
languages.original_text: "This vault of rarities belongs to the Necron Overlord Trazyn the Infinite, Perpetuator of Histories, Keeper of the Great Library. All historical artefacts of the Koronus Expanse that have been deemed worthy of the overlord's attention are gathered here at his will."

traits.locale_text: 「この珍品庫はネクロンのオーバーロードであるトラズン・ザ・インフィニット、歴史の継承者、大図書館の守護者のものである。コーロナス・エクスパンションの歴史的遺物で、オーバーロードの注意に値すると見なされたものは、彼の意思によってここに集められている。」

languages.text: «Esta colección de rarezas pertenece a Trazyn el Infinito, Preservador de Historias, Archivista de las Galerías de Solemnace . Numerosos artefactos históricos considerados dignos de la atención del Señor Supremo han sido reunidos aquí por su voluntad. La sala que tienes delante alberga artefactos notables de la {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Extensión de Koronus{/g}».
languages.original_text: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Esta colección de rarezas pertenece a Trazyn el Infinito, Preservador de Historias, Archivista de las Galerías de Solemnace . Numerosos artefactos históricos considerados dignos de la atención del Señor Supremo han sido reunidos aquí por su voluntad. La sala que tienes delante alberga artefactos notables de la {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Extensión de Koronus{/g}».

languages.text: “这座珍奇宝库属于无限者特拉金——历史保存者，索勒姆纳斯展厅的考古档案官。凡是霸主认为值得他瞩目的历史造物，皆按其意志汇聚于此。你现在所见的展厅，便珍藏着源自{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}科罗努斯扩区{/g}的非凡藏品。”
languages.original_text: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “这座珍奇宝库属于无限者特拉金——历史保存者，索勒姆纳斯展厅的考古档案官。凡是霸主认为值得他瞩目的历史造物，皆按其意志汇聚于此。你现在所见的展厅，便珍藏着源自{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}科罗努斯扩区{/g}的非凡藏品。”

languages.text: "Diese Kollektion von Seltenheiten gehört Trazyn dem Unendlichen, Bewahrer der Geschichte und Archeovar der Solemnum-Galerien. Eine Vielzahl historischer Artefakte, die der Aufmerksamkeit des Hochlords für würdig erachtet wurden, werden hier auf sein Geheiß aufbewahrt. Die Halle, in der Ihr gerade steht, enthält bemerkenswerte Artefakte aus der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g}."
languages.original_text: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Kollektion von Seltenheiten gehört Trazyn dem Unendlichen, Bewahrer der Geschichte und Archeovar der Solemnum-Galerien. Eine Vielzahl historischer Artefakte, die der Aufmerksamkeit des Hochlords für würdig erachtet wurden, werden hier auf sein Geheiß aufbewahrt. languages.text: "Bu nadideler mahzeni; Tarihlerin Koruyucusu, Kutuyku Galerileri'nin Arkeoşivcisi Mutlak Trazyn'e aittir. Hükümdarın ilgisine layık görülen sayısız tarihî eser, onun iradesiyle burada toplanmıştır. Şu anda gördüğünüz salon, {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Enginliği'nden{/g} kayda değer eserler barındırmaktadır."
languages.original_text: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Bu nadideler mahzeni; Tarihlerin Koruyucusu, Kutuyku Galerileri'nin Arkeoşivcisi Mutlak Trazyn'e aittir. Hükümdarın ilgisine layık görülen sayısız tarihî eser, onun iradesiyle burada toplanmıştır. Şu anda gördüğünüz salon, {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Enginliği'nden{/g} kayda değer eserler barındırmaktadır."

languages.text: « Cette salle renferme des objets rares appartenant à Trazyn l'Infini, Conservateur des histoires, Archéoviste des galeries de Solemnace. Les nombreux artefacts historiques qui ont été jugés dignes de l'attention du tétrarque sont rassemblés ici. La salle où vous vous trouvez contient des artefacts remarquables provenant des {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Étendues de Koronus{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."
